plugin.name: Routine
plugin.description: Todoist-like recurring tasks with natural language repeat syntax
plugin.author: asktru

plugin.commands.name: generate repeats
plugin.commands.description: Generate next occurrences of completed @repeat() tasks

plugin.commands.name: onEditorWillSave
plugin.commands.description: Auto-generate repeats when note is saved

plugin.commands.name: Enable auto-repeat for this note
plugin.commands.description: Add the onEditorWillSave trigger to the current note's frontmatter so completing @repeat tasks auto-generates the next occurrence.

plugin.commands.name: Routine Dashboard
plugin.commands.description: View all repeating tasks across your notes

plugin.settings.title: Delete completed repeat
plugin.settings.description: When enabled, the completed task is removed after generating the next repeat. When disabled, the completed task is kept for reference.

plugin.settings.title: Recent notes to scan
plugin.settings.description: Number of recently-edited notes to scan for completed repeats (in addition to the current note). Useful when completing tasks via backlinks.

plugin.settings.title: Log level
plugin.settings.description: Set to DEBUG for verbose logging
